hero.description: Welcome to Deco Right, your trusted partner for exquisite interior design and decor solutions. We bring your vision to life with creativity and style.

services.title: Explore our range of interior design services
services.description: From concept to completion, we offer comprehensive design solutions tailored to meet your unique needs.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question about our services, pricing, or anything else, our team is ready to answer all your questions.

call_us.title: Call Us
call_us.description: Have a quick question? Give us a call or send a text.

mail_support.title: Mail & Support
mail_support.description: Email us for detailed inquiries and project proposals.

visit_us.title: Visit Us
visit_us.description: Come visit our office to discuss your project in person.

services.service_list_description: Discover our tailored design services — from initial concept and space planning to finishes and custom furniture. We collaborate with you to create interiors that are beautiful, functional, and made for living.
services.service_card_description: Let Decoright handle every detail — styling, installations, and expert finishes that turn empty space into something exceptional

projects.project_list_description: Explore a curated gallery of projects where every room tells a story. From concept sketches to finished interiors, see how ideas, materials and craft come together to shape meaningful spaces.

faqs.faq_description: Find answers to common questions about our design services, process, and pricing

password.reset_description: Enter the email linked to your account and we’ll send you a reset link to create a new password

password.error_invalid_match: Invalid password or passwords do not match

password.error_same_password: New password should be different from the old password

password.change_error_auth_mismatch: Authentication issue — try logging out and back in
